_comment: Mirror of ../.github/plugin/marketplace.json for Claude Code / cross-tool compatibility. Upstream github/copilot-plugins uses a symlink; we use a copy for Windows portability. Keep in sync.
name: personakit

metadata.description: Personakit — synthetic-customer plugin for GitHub Copilot. Generate persona agents from market research, interview them, run multi-persona panels, and produce pricing + go-to-market plans through a PM Orchestrator agent.

plugins.name: personakit
plugins.description: Synthetic-customer engine: persona generation, interviews, panels, and PM-orchestrated GTM planning.
